notableEvents.label: J.P. Crawford plunked
notableEvents.detail: J.P. Crawford hit by pitch. Randy Arozarena to 3rd. Luke Raley to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: J.P. Crawford GIDP
notableEvents.detail: J.P. Crawford grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd. J.P. Crawford out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Patrick Wisdom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Patrick Wisdom strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, first baseman Ty France to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Julio Rodríguez out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.
